title: Mass Edit Automations
excerpt:

posts.author: crparrett (Christian Parrett)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey all,

Currently, I have 6 different boards that contain 10-20 automations for task creation. They are all setup to assign the created task to one individual. Is there a way to mass edit these automations to change who the tasks are assigned to when created?

Thanks in advance.

posts.author: melissav-monday.com (Melissa - monday.com)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @crparrett! At this time, there is not a way to mass edit your automations. I definitely see how this could be useful, so I’d be happy to submit it as a feature request to our team
